mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibe.archive_file (id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_size, created_at, uploader_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{boardId}, #{originalName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{storedName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileSize,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uploaderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_size, created_at, uploader_id FROM vibe.archive_file WHERE board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
